mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_rule (pet_type, indicator_name, min_value, max_value, warning_text, suggestion, risk_level, create_time) VALUES (#{petType}, #{indicatorName}, #{minValue}, #{maxValue}, #{warningText}, #{suggestion}, #{riskLevel}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, pet_type, indicator_name, min_value, max_value, warning_text, suggestion, risk_level, create_time FROM health_rule WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, pet_type, indicator_name, min_value, max_value, warning_text, suggestion, risk_level, create_time FROM health_rule ORDER BY pet_type, indicator_name
SELECT id, pet_type, indicator_name, min_value, max_value, warning_text, suggestion, risk_level, create_time FROM health_rule WHERE pet_type = #{petType} ORDER BY indicator_name
